title: 7 Ways a Godly Man Leads Without Saying a Word
caption:
Real leadership doesn't start with rank.

It starts with who shows up first, apologizes first, takes the last seat, does what he said he'd do with no reminder needed. A man of God leads by example in the way that actually costs something — the quiet cost, the one no one thanks him for.

The men who get handed authority usually aren't the ones chasing it. They're the ones in the room doing the thing everyone else is waiting for someone to do.

Save this and pick one to practice this week.

#faith #leadership #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #christianleadership #christianity #formation #servantleadership
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
